# SEER Project Memory — auto-managed by SEER. Do not edit manually.

## 1. Project Overview
name: SEER MCP Server
goal: AI prompt intelligence platform — optimizes prompts via MCP, with Next.js dashboard for billing, usage, and API key management
stack: TypeScript / Express / Vercel / Supabase / Anthropic Haiku / Next.js 15 / React 19 / Tailwind CSS / Dodo Payments / Razorpay / Upstash Redis

## 2. Current Status
last_updated: 2026-04-09T14:28Z
phase: Build — mid (v1.1 complete, Agency Portal Phase 1-5 + invite system + project management + real-time memory sync + onboarding + feature toggles + webhooks complete, Founder's Space Phase 1-5 complete, all migrations live, Dodo FS addon created, checkout flow wired, Vercel env set, production smoke test passed, Admin Console built)
last_completed: Admin Console — full analytics dashboard (overview KPIs, user management, revenue/MRR/churn, API cost tracking, expense management)
next_action: Run migration 020, deploy admin console, add initial expenses data

## 3. Architecture Decisions
- Remote HTTP MCP on Vercel (NOT stdio) — StreamableHTTPServerTransport
- Haiku ONLY for AI calls — max_tokens 800, ~$0.001 per call
- SEER instructs Claude to read/write .seer_memory.md — Claude uses user's own API key, not Haiku
- Dodo Payments as MoR for global, Razorpay for India
- Supabase for auth + database + RLS on all tables
- OpenAI text-embedding-3-small for memory vector search (Pro+ only)
- In-memory rate limiting on MCP server, Upstash Redis for web login rate limiting

## 5. Agency Portal — Feature Spec
goal: Multi-tenant agency platform where each Agency customer gets their own admin portal
plan_tier: Agency ($99/mo, unlimited calls)

### Core Features
- **Separate portal per agency** — unique URL, isolated admin dashboard
- **User management** — agency admin creates users, assigns Starter/Pro plans, manages access
- **Auto-generated API keys** — each user gets unique API key on creation
- **Scoped user dashboards** — same as normal Starter/Pro dashboards, but under agency context
- **Shared cloud memory** — real-time sync of .seer_memory.md across team via Supabase
- **Activity tracking** — who's working on what feature/module in real time
- **Smart task suggestions** — detect conflicts ("User 1 is on auth, try payments instead"), suggest unworked features
- **Admin announcements** — agency admin posts updates, reflected on all user dashboards

### Database Tables (planned)
- `agencies` — id, name, owner_id, slug, plan, max_users, created_at
- `agency_users` — agency_id, user_id, role (admin/member), assigned_plan (starter/pro), api_key, created_at
- `agency_projects` — agency_id, project_name, cloud_memory (content/hash/version), updated_at
- `agency_activity` — agency_id, user_id, project_id, feature_label, status (active/idle), last_seen
- `agency_announcements` — agency_id, title, body, posted_by, created_at

### Build Order (5 phases)
1. Agency table + portal skeleton + admin user management (CRUD)
2. Auto API key generation + scoped user dashboards
3. Shared cloud memory (push/pull/sync with SHA-256 integrity)
4. Real-time activity tracking + smart task deconfliction suggestions
5. Admin analytics dashboard + announcements system

### Open Design Questions
1. Pricing — flat $99/mo or per-seat pricing?
2. User limits — admin-configurable or fixed by Agency tier?
3. User plan costs — covered by agency subscription or individual payment?
4. Portal URL — **RESOLVED: path-based (/agency/:slug)** — migrate to subdomain in Phase 5+ if needed
5. Real-time approach — per-call logging (near real-time) or WebSocket (true real-time)?
6. Build order — **RESOLVED: Phase 1 complete** — proceeding phase-by-phase

## Founder's Space — Feature Spec
goal: Operational workspace inside SEER dashboard — tasks, credentials, documents, notes — accessible from dashboard + Claude Code via seer_space MCP tool
source_doc: D:/SEER/Founders_Space_in_SEER_Feature_Doc_v1.docx

### Pricing
- Free: No access
- Starter ($8/mo): $1/mo addon
- Pro ($19/mo): Included
- Agency ($39/mo): Included + team shared vault

### 4 Data Modules
1. **Tasks** — project-scoped, statuses: open/in_progress/done/blocked, due dates, created_via tracking
2. **Credentials** — AES-256-GCM encrypted, masked in dashboard, reveal-on-click, NEVER return plaintext to terminal
3. **Documents** — Supabase Storage file upload, doc types: agreement/certificate/invoice/other, expiry tracking (30-day warning)
4. **Notes** — append-only, project-scoped, human reference only (not injected into AI context)

### Database (same Supabase, fs_ prefix)
- fs_projects (id, user_id, name)
- fs_tasks (id, user_id, project_id, title, status, due_date, created_via)
- fs_credentials (id, user_id, project_id, label, value_encrypted, iv, auth_tag, environment, last_used_at)
- fs_documents (id, user_id, project_id, filename, doc_type, expiry_date, tags, storage_path, file_size)
- fs_notes (id, user_id, project_id, body, created_at)
- users.fs_access boolean (auto-true for pro/agency)

### seer_space MCP Tool Actions
- add task, tasks, save key, key (existence only), docs, note, projects, new project
- --team flag for agency shared items (Phase 5)
- Wire overdue tasks + expiring certs into seer_status

### Build Order (5 phases)
1. DB migration + AES-256 encryption lib + dashboard shell + plan gating
2. Tasks kanban + Notes + Projects CRUD (parallel with 3)
3. Credentials vault + Documents upload (parallel with 2)
4. seer_space MCP tool + $1 Starter addon billing (needs 2+3)
5. Agency team shared vault + polish (needs 4)

### Key Env Vars Needed
- FS_ENCRYPTION_KEY — AES-256 key derivation secret (min 32 chars)
- DODO_ADDON_FS_PRICE_ID — $1/mo addon product in Dodo

### Plan file
- Full detailed plan at: C:/Users/jagad/.claude/plans/immutable-sauteeing-llama.md
